query:
UPDATE articles SET pairId = 1 WHERE id IN (1, 8);
UPDATE articles SET imageUrl = (SELECT imageUrl FROM (SELECT imageUrl FROM articles WHERE id = 1) t) WHERE id = 8 AND (imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '')
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 42vUY4GWD37yPbX.84737946735b --database 3BmmrMXwxV4Z2AuoDAe93z --execute UPDATE articles SET pairId = 1 WHERE id IN (1, 8);
